title: 坚韧连结
effectDetails: 爆头击杀会使同伴恢复倒计时减少 3 秒。如果同伴的暴击几率超过 50%，那么主人将获得 +1.2x 最终暴击伤害倍率。
tipKeywords: 与同类效果的叠加方式

provenance.excerpt: The mod can be bought from The Business for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Doer with Solaris United .
The mod can be bought from The Business for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Doer with Solaris United .
Despite the mod's description reading "over 50%", the buff will still be applied when the companion's crit chance is at 50% . In other words, the companion's crit chance needs to be ≥ 50%.

Critical damage multiplier is a flat final and follows the formula 1 + (tier * (crit multi - 1 + final)) where the first tier is yellow (eg. skana multi is 1.5x which is brought to 2.7x (2.7x on yellow, 4.4x on orange, 6.1x on red and so on) the impact lessens depending on modded critical multiplier)
The Robotic Weapons that can satisfy the critical chance requirements without Riven Mods are:
Prime Laser Rifle , Vulcax and Vulklok with Point Strike , Laser Rifle with Critical Delay .
Burst Laser Prime and Prisma Burst Laser with Primed Pistol Gambit or Creeping Bullseye .
The Beast Companions that can satisfy the critical chance requirements are:
All Kavats and Vulpaphylas with Bite .
Huras Kubrow and Chesa Kubrow with Bite .
The requirement can be satisfied by other Kubrows and Predasites using Hunter Synergy and a primary weapon with sufficient critical chance, depending on the breed.

provenance.note: 上游 chance=1 表示满足声望条件后可兑换，不是随机掉落。
